name: amethyst-launcher
description: Amethyst - standalone vanilla Minecraft launcher. Pure Node.js CLI (no browser, no HTML, no web JS, no npm dependencies).

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/launcher/accounts.js && node --check src/launcher/downloader.js && node --check src/launcher/javaLocator.js && node --check src/launcher/minecraft.js && node --check src/launcher/mojangApi.js && node --check src/launcher/news.js && node --check src/launcher/os.js && node --check src/launcher/rules.js && node --check src/launcher/store.js

author: Amethyst contributors
